active.name: Seismic Slam
active.rawText: Deals 30 (+80% Attack) damage to all enemies in melee range and Stuns for 1 turn.

passives.name: Adrenaline Rush
passives.rawText: When this hero drops below 50% HP, gain 25 (+50% Attack) Attack for 3 turns.

passives.name: Unbreakable
passives.rawText: Gain 5 (+10% HP) Shield at the start of combat.

passives.name: Reserve Tactics
passives.rawText: While benched, the frontmost ally gains 15 (+20% HP) Shield at the start of combat.
